languages.text: "Шепотки говорят... да, точно. Что из десятка один да пригодится нам, {name}. По-моему, отличный счет, а?"
"The whispers say... yes, do it. One out of ten will do for us, {name}. Sounds like a good deal to me, eh?"
languages.original_text: "Шепотки говорят... да, точно. Что из десятка один да пригодится нам, {name}. По-моему, отличный счет, а?"

traits.locale_text: "The whispers say... yes, do it. One out of ten will do for us, {name}. Sounds like a good deal to me, eh?"
"The whispers say... yes, do it. One out of ten will do for us, {name}. Sounds like a good deal to me, eh?"
"The whispers say... yes, do it. One out of ten will do for us, {name}. Sounds like a good deal to me, eh?"

languages.text: 「ささやきが言うには…ええ、やってみろ。10人中1人でも我々には十分だ、{name}。私にとっては良い取引のように思えるが、どうだろう」
languages.original_text: "The whispers say... yes, do it. One out of ten will do for us, {name}. Sounds like a good deal to me, eh?"

traits.locale_text: 「ささやきが言うには…ええ、やってみろ。10人中1人でも我々には十分だ、{name}。私にとっては良い取引のように思えるが、どうだろう？」

languages.text: «Los susurros dicen... sí, hágalo. Con uno de cada diez bastará, {name}. Es un buen trato, ¿no le parece?».
languages.original_text: "The whispers say... yes, do it. One out of ten will do for us, {name}. Sounds like a good deal to me, eh?"

traits.locale_text: «Los susurros dicen... sí, hágalo. Con uno de cada diez bastará, {name}. Es un buen trato, ¿no le parece?».

languages.text: “低语说……对，就这么办。十存其一的比例对我们来说很划算，{name}。这买卖听起来不错，不是吗？”
languages.original_text: "The whispers say... yes, do it. One out of ten will do for us, {name}. Sounds like a good deal to me, eh?"

traits.locale_text: “低语说……对，就这么办。十存其一的比例对我们来说很划算，{name}。这买卖听起来不错，不是吗？”

languages.text: "Die Flüsterstimmen sagen ... ja, tut es. Einer von zehn wird reichen, {name}. Klingt nach einer guten Quote, oder?"
languages.original_text: "The whispers say... yes, do it. One out of ten will do for us, {name}. Sounds like a good deal to me, eh?"

traits.locale_text: "Die Flüsterstimmen sagen ... ja, tut es. Einer von zehn wird reichen, {name}. Klingt nach einer guten Quote, oder?"

languages.text: "Fısıltılar diyor ki... Evet, yapalım. Onda bir bize yeter {name}. Kulağa iyi bir anlaşma gibi gelmiyor mu?"
languages.original_text: "The whispers say... yes, do it. One out of ten will do for us, {name}. Sounds like a good deal to me, eh?"

traits.locale_text: "Fısıltılar diyor ki... Evet, yapalım. Onda bir bize yeter {name}. Kulağa iyi bir anlaşma gibi gelmiyor mu?"

languages.text: « Les murmures disent... oui, faites-les. Un sur dix nous suffira amplement, {name}. Une offre généreuse, vous ne trouvez pas ? »
languages.original_text: "The whispers say... yes, do it. One out of ten will do for us, {name}. Sounds like a good deal to me, eh?"
